name: legal billing specialists processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For legal billing specialists processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate invoice formatting causes cash flow gaps. We convert timesheet data into formatted invoices instead of manual invoice creation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate invoice formatting from timesheet data
